summary: M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 is CLOSED after PR #221 passed both required CI jobs, merged, and origin/main contains the accepted systemic interaction recovery validation at 2adc668bba95724aa2448bd898983fc6d9740178. This validates the repaired phase/action loop, District 1 obligation path, appointment preview/confirm feedback, map/task/inspector synchronization, screenshots, and console-cleanliness evidence enough to reopen formal M7 content-lock reconsideration. It does not approve formal M7 content lock.

tests_run.result: PASS; Quality, Web, and Browser Smoke passed; Windows Desktop Smoke Artifact passed.
PASS; PR #221 merged and origin/main advanced to 2adc668bba95724aa2448bd898983fc6d9740178.

tests_run.result: PASS; local main and origin/main both resolved to 2adc668bba95724aa2448bd898983fc6d9740178 before this closure branch.

decisions.decision: Close M7-SYSTEMIC-INTERACTION-VALIDATION-001 only after PR #221 passed CI, merged, and origin/main contained the accepted validation evidence.
This closure does not approve formal M7 content lock and does not set content_lock_accepted=true.
M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED and now awaits product-owner reconsideration after systemic interaction recovery validation.
M7-EXIT-VALIDATION-001 must not start while M7-CONTENT-LOCK-ACCEPTANCE-001 remains BLOCKED.

risks.summary: Autonomous continuation must pause at the content-lock Human Gate until the product owner explicitly decides.
risks.mitigation: Route the refreshed Human Gate package to product_owner and do not start M7 exit validation.

risks.summary: Validation accepted the recovered interaction path, but small viewport density remains a polish follow-up and is not a formal content-lock approval by itself.

blockers.summary: Choose APPROVE_CONTENT_LOCK_WITH_LIMITS, DEFER_CONTENT_LOCK, or REQUEST_CHANGES after systemic interaction recovery validation.

requested_action: Product-owner Human Gate decision required before M7 exit validation can start.
